hero.title: Welcome to Unitn Esports
hero.sub: Student-run competitive gaming and community events. Join us!

presentation.p1: Short presentation of your organization. Replace this paragraph with a description of mission, history, and what you do. Keep it concise and friendly.
presentation.p2: Explain how people can join, signup links, tryouts, or meetings. Add links to more resources here.
presentation.tip: Tip: put forms or Discord/Telegram invites here.

calendar.desc: Public calendar of events. Replace the calendar ID below to embed your Google Calendar and enable subscribe/download options.
calendar.howto: How to get your calendar ID: make your Google Calendar public, then use the 'Integrate calendar' → 'Public address in iCal format' or calendar ID. Replace both the embed src and the subscribe/download links below.

contact.desc: Questions, partnerships, or volunteering? Fill the form or email us directly.
contact.addLinks: Add links to Twitch, GitHub, or other pages here.

hero.title: Benvenuti in Unitn Esports
hero.sub: Associazione studentesca per esports e eventi. Unisciti a noi!

presentation.p1: Breve presentazione dell'associazione. Sostituisci questo paragrafo con la mission, la storia e cosa facciamo.
presentation.p2: Spiega come iscriversi, link per le prove, o gli incontri. Aggiungi link a risorse.
presentation.tip: Suggerimento: inserisci form o inviti a Discord/Telegram qui.

calendar.desc: Calendario pubblico degli eventi. Sostituisci l’ID del calendario per incorporare il tuo Google Calendar e abilitare iscrizione/download.
calendar.howto: Per ottenere l'ID del calendario: rendi pubblico il calendario in Google Calendar e copia l'ID dal pannello Integrate calendar (es. abcd1234@group.calendar.google.com).

contact.desc: Domande, partnership, o volontariato? Compila il form o scrivici via email.
contact.addLinks: Aggiungi link a Twitch, GitHub o altre pagine qui.

footer.copy: © 2025 Unitn Esports — Tutti i diritti riservati
